label: plain_text
text:
The numbers 16 and 36 are both squares with 6 in the units 
6 place.
However, 26, whose units digit is also 6, is not a square. Therefore, we
cannot determine if a number is a square
just by looking at the digit
t in
the units place. But, the units 
digit
can tell
us when a number is not a
square. If a number ends with 2, 3, 7, or 8, then we can definitely s
say that
it is not a square.
